title: Opinion: It’s time for a new era of advocacy for physicians
description: “Physicians are, by nature and necessity, advocates,” writes Sarah C. Nosal, president of the American Academy of Family Physicians.
content: “Physicians are, by nature and necessity, advocates,” writes Sarah C. Nosal, president of the American Academy of Family Physicians.
